payload.answer: This looks like a transient observation and may not be worth saving as durable personal memory. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Do not save this as memory.
Save anyway as a one-time note: “Today’s weather is cloudy.”
If this is meant to represent a preference or routine, rephrase it as a durable fact to save.
